human_summary: 19+ features shipped. Session 13 active: timer visualization redesigned (Bloom → Flow → Aurora → Quiet Water), tap-to-hide numbers, auto-build v2.1 stress-tested. 8 queued tasks. Auto-build v2.1 with 5 postmortem fixes.

next_tasks.description: Tune page enter transition to 200ms (Q49). Currently 300ms in index.css (page-enter-anim 0.3s). Change to 0.2s. The exit is fine.

Audit all interactive elements for 44px minimum touch targets (Q50). Check: TabBar buttons, tag pills in TimerFAB, theme toggle options, mood picker icons, settings buttons. Add min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] or padding where needed. Do NOT change visual appearance — only increase hit areas.

Show total practice hours on HomePage as a subtle stat below the main hero (Q61). Use useSeason().totalHours. Format as 'Xh total' in text-text-3 text-xs. Position below the river chart, above the session cards. Keep it quiet — informational, not heroic.

Add data export in Settings (Q60). Primary: JSON (full session array from localStorage). Secondary: CSV (date, duration_minutes, tags joined by semicolons, mood, note). Add two buttons to SettingsPage.jsx: 'Export JSON' and 'Export CSV'. Use Blob + URL.createObjectURL + click-to-download pattern. No server needed.

Add subtle green dot in Settings showing backup health (Q62). Show a small green circle next to 'Data' section if localStorage has sessions. Show amber if sessions exist but no export has ever been done (check localStorage key 'river-last-export'). Set that key's value to ISO timestamp when user exports.

MoodPicker should only appear after the user's 3rd session (Rubin: progressive disclosure). In TimerFAB.jsx, check sessions count from storage. If fewer than 3 completed sessions, don't render the MoodPicker component in the stopped state. Import getSessions from storage.js and check length on mount.

Add apple-touch-startup-image meta tags to index.html for iPhone splash screens. Generate splash images as inline SVGs with dark background (#0C0A09) and 'The River' text centered in DM Serif Display. Cover at minimum: iPhone 15 Pro (1179x2556), iPhone 14 (1170x2532), iPhone SE (750x1334). Add the meta tags with media queries for each device size.

completed.note: Already done — getSavedTheme() defaults to dark
Already applied in ReadingCeremony, CelebrationOverlay, OnboardingFlow, TimerFAB

steps: Check JS bundle size < 420KB raw / 125KB gzip (Jobs: build gate catches drift, not just failure)
Verify key elements: hero stat, tab bar (4 tabs), FAB visible
No React errors in console (Vite websocket errors OK)
Take screenshot, save to docs/overnight-screenshots/ with commit hash (Ive: visual morning review)
build_gate.on_failure: git stash, save hash to stash_archive, log failure, move to next_task

panic_recovery.json_parse_fails: git log -1 --format=%H, set status to clean, start fresh
panic_recovery.build_fails: git stash, save ref to stash_archive, move to next_task
panic_recovery.merge_conflicts: git pull --rebase. If rebase fails: git rebase --abort, git stash, reset to origin, start fresh
panic_recovery.push_rejected: git pull --rebase origin <branch>, retry push. Never force-push.
panic_recovery.dirty_state_unclear: git stash, save ref to stash_archive, set status to clean

auto_build_config._note: v2: auto-build.sh handles infrastructure. LLM only does creative work.
